prompt: Estimate or interpret the measurable condition and state why it is out of tolerance.
scenario: In a T3 work setting, the evaluated element is F-301 Drywall & finishing within 2.6 Carpentry & Finishes. The relevant subcategory is 2.6.3 Interior Finish. The observed field condition is: joints not staggered. The work is being assessed at the rough-complete lifecycle state with source anchors GA-216, IRC. The measurable cue is visible enough to estimate whether the condition is within tolerance.
title: T3 F-301 Measurement & estimation
